title: Superintendent's records; use of certified copies as evidence
doc_html:
§27.  Superintendent's records; use of certified copies as evidence

Certified copies of records and papers in the office of the superintendent shall in all cases be received and admitted in evidence in lieu of the originals.  

Acts 1975, No. 274, §1.

§27.  Superintendent's records; use of certified copies as evidence
Certified copies of records and papers in the office of the superintendent shall in all cases be received and admitted in evidence in lieu of the originals.
Acts 1975, No. 274, §1.
